evals.prompt: 帮我生成一个 BuilderBio，把我本地所有 AI coding agent 的使用痕迹都扫出来并发布
evals.expected_output: Runs a full-history BuilderBio scan, emits an audit report, builds D/E, and publishes a live BuilderBio page
assertions: Runs parse_sessions.py with --days 0 for a full-history scan
Scans all known local agent roots instead of stopping at a single agent
Produces scanner_version and scan_audit metadata in the parsed result
Carries scanner_version into D.profile and scan_audit into E.scan_audit before publish
Publishes directly to builderbio.dev instead of relying on a local HTML preview
Prints an audit summary that shows parsed sources, unknown sources, and partial sessions

evals.prompt: 我本地用了 Claude Code、Codex、Trae 和 Cursor，你要尽量别漏掉任何日志
evals.expected_output: Discovers strong-path logs plus weak-path candidates, parses what it can, and marks the profile partial when coverage is incomplete
assertions: Recursively scans ~/.claude/projects and merges subagent logs by sessionId
Uses Codex cumulative token snapshots instead of double-counting turn-level token events
Scans Trae state.vscdb ItemTable keys across supported key families
Performs weak discovery across common roots to detect additional chat/session logs such as Cursor-like JSONL files
Uses a generic fallback parser for chat-like JSON/JSONL sources when no dedicated parser exists
If fallback parsing or unknown sources remain, records rescan guidance in the audit metadata instead of silently ignoring them

evals.prompt: 只看最近 7 天，重新更新我的 BuilderBio，并告诉我这次扫描是否完整
evals.expected_output: Runs a 7-day scan, updates the same published profile, and reports scan completeness alongside the refreshed stats
assertions: Respects the requested 7-day cutoff
Reuses the same device identity and publish token flow for profile updates
Keeps scanner_version and scan_audit metadata on republish
Explains whether the scan is complete or partial using the audit summary
Does not claim missing-agent coverage if the audit still shows unknown sources

evals.prompt: 生成我的 AI 编程画像，要脱敏，不能暴露任何项目路径和仓库名
evals.expected_output: Generates a redacted BuilderBio while preserving aggregate behavior and scan transparency
assertions: Scans all supported logs before analysis
Redacts cwd paths, repo names, and other sensitive path-like strings before publish
Preserves aggregate stats, evolution, time distribution, and highlights after redaction
Keeps scan_audit metadata so the user can still see what was scanned and whether anything was partial
Does not leak local absolute paths into the published profile
